name: Thangam Balaji Guest House
tagline: Comfort, cleanliness, and convenience in central Chennai.
shortDescription: Budget guest house near US Consulate, Apollo Cancer Hospital, and Teynampet. Ideal for business travelers, families, and medical visitors with affordable rooms and a homely atmosphere.

location.address: 407, Anna Salai, near Kalaignar Tv, Subbarayan Nagar, Teynampet, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600018

topPositiveComments.quote: One of the best place to stay, very clean and tidy and quiet environment for rest even though it is in the middle of the city. Good administration.
topPositiveComments.author: drmuhammadh

topPositiveComments.quote: Ideal for visa appointment and medical visits. Clean rooms and helpful staff.
topPositiveComments.author: Guest

rooms.name: Standard Twin Room
rooms.description: Two single beds with air conditioning, clean white bedding, and essential amenities. Ideal for friends or colleagues.

rooms.name: Twin Room with TV
rooms.description: Twin beds with wall-mounted TV and window AC. Simple, clean room for a comfortable stay.

rooms.name: Standard Guest Room
rooms.description: Cozy room with comfortable bedding, small seating area, and window. Essential amenities for a pleasant stay.

rooms.name: Single Room
rooms.description: Single bed with quilted headboard, white bedding, and power outlets. Compact and comfortable.

seo.title: Thangam Balaji Guest House Chennai | Near US Consulate & Apollo Hospital
seo.metaDescription: Budget guest house in Teynampet, Chennai. Near US Consulate, VFS Global, Apollo Cancer Hospital & Metro. Clean rooms, free Wi-Fi, breakfast. Ideal for visa appointments & medical visitors.
